universal_short_cold.label: Cold short, proof-first
universal_short_cold.subject: Quick question about {{company}}
universal_short_cold.initialMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

{{one_line_proof|Recent work that maps to what {{company}} is building, happy to share specifics in 15 min.}}

Worth a short call this week or next?

Best,
{{my_name|}}
universal_short_cold.follow1Msg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Bumping last week's note. Tuesday 3 to 5 pm or Thursday morning work on my side, whichever's easier on yours.
universal_short_cold.lastFollowMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Last nudge from me. If the timing isn't right at {{company}}, no problem at all.

starter_jobpost_reply.label: JD response (any role)
starter_jobpost_reply.subject: {{role_name|Applicant}} via {{platform|your posting}}
starter_jobpost_reply.initialMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Applying for the {{role_name|open role}} at {{company}} from {{platform|your careers page}}. Resume attached, portfolio at {{portfolio_link|the link in my signature}}.

{{proof_bullet|One result worth flagging up front: see resume for context.}}

Happy to share a short Loom on prior work if that speeds the screen.
starter_jobpost_reply.follow1Msg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Quick check on the {{role_name|open role}} application. Glad to send a tailored walk-through of any specific area on the JD if useful.
starter_jobpost_reply.lastFollowMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Final note on the {{role_name|open role}}. If it's filled, no worries, happy to be considered for the next opening.

starter_referral.label: Referral intro
starter_referral.subject: Referred your way: {{topic|quick hello}}
starter_referral.initialMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

{{referrer_name|A mutual contact}} suggested I reach out about {{company}}. Quick context attached.

{{proof_bullet|One specific thing worth talking about, I'll save the rest for the call.}}

Would a 20 min slot next Tuesday or Wednesday work on your side?
starter_referral.follow1Msg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Bumping the note from {{referrer_name|our mutual contact}}. Any window next week that works?
starter_referral.lastFollowMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Closing the loop. If nothing's open at {{company}} right now, no worries, I'll watch the space.

universal_thankyou.label: Thank you, post-interview
universal_thankyou.subject: Thanks for your time today
universal_thankyou.initialMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Thanks for the conversation about {{role_name|the role}} at {{company}}. Came away more excited about the work and the team.

{{followup_offer|Happy to share any extra context that would be useful for the next round, references, samples, or a short Loom walking through prior work.}}

universal_reengage.label: 60 day re-engage
universal_reengage.subject: Following up from a couple months back
universal_reengage.initialMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

We spoke (or I reached out) about {{company}} a couple of months back, wanted to circle back. Things have moved on my side since:

{{recent_wins|One or two recent wins worth flagging, swap with your latest.}}

If anything's changed on your end, happy to chat. If not, no worries, I'll keep an eye on {{company}}.
universal_reengage.follow1Msg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Bumping this re-engage note in case it got buried.
universal_reengage.lastFollowMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Closing the loop fully on this one. If {{company}} ever needs a hand, my inbox is open.
